patches.hypothesis: The root cause of the issue is that the OptionBuilder properties are not being properly reset before creating a new Option. The refined fix ensures that all properties are reset correctly after creating an Option instance, preventing overfitting to specific test cases.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug is caused by the fact that the OptionBuilder's properties are not being properly reset after creating an Option instance. This leads to the next created Option inheriting the properties of the previous one.

patches.hypothesis: The bug is caused by the fact that the description and other properties are not being properly reset after creating an Option. This leads to the next created Option inheriting the previous properties.
